rationale: Diff contains only an execution result.json evidence file. No source changes to execute_bead.go or execute_bead_loop.go, no tests, no schema_compat verification. None of the 8 acceptance criteria can be evaluated as implemented.

findings.summary: No changes to cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go prompt to require verification_command or needs-investigation marker (AC1).
No changes to cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go to parse rationale, run verification_command, or apply triage:* labels and events (AC2, AC3, AC4).
schema_compat_test.go not exercised by any change; bd/br round-trip claim unverified (AC8).
Only artifact in diff is an execution result.json with outcome=task_succeeded, but no actual code landed — likely a merge/commit issue where the implementation branch was lost.
